description: Shared ServiceNow Table API connection (instance subdomain + auth). Supports basic auth for dev instances and bearer-token OAuth for production. Pairs with servicenow_ingestion (read) and servicenow_sensor (event-driven trigger).

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Resource registration key. Other components reference it via this name.

instance_env_var.label: Instance Env Var
instance_env_var.description: Env var with the ServiceNow instance subdomain (e.g. 'mycompany' or 'dev123456'). Just the subdomain — no https:// or .service-now.com.

username_env_var.label: Username Env Var
username_env_var.description: Env var with ServiceNow username (basic auth). Required unless bearer_token_env_var is set.

password_env_var.label: Password Env Var
password_env_var.description: Env var with ServiceNow password (basic auth). Required unless bearer_token_env_var is set.

bearer_token_env_var.label: Bearer Token Env Var
bearer_token_env_var.description: Env var holding a ServiceNow OAuth bearer token. When set, basic auth fields are ignored. Pair with oauth_token_resource for token acquisition + rotation.

verify_ssl.label: Verify SSL
verify_ssl.description: Enable TLS verification. Set false only for self-signed dev instances.
